fixes.title: Fix ClickHouse span_id and parent_span_id writes
fixes.description: ClickHouse appendEvent writes randomUUID() as span_id and '' as parent_span_id, destroying the real hierarchy
fixes.fix: Use event.spanId ?? randomUUID() and event.parentSpanId ?? '' instead of unconditional randomUUID()

fixes.title: Fix ClickHouse empty agent_name
fixes.fix: Use event.agentName ?? event.data?.agentName ?? '' instead of hardcoded ''

fixes.title: Fix message.content ContentBlock[] handling
fixes.description: message.content can be ContentBlock[] but UI only handles string
fixes.fix: In buildConversationTree: Array.isArray(content) ? content.filter(b => b.type === 'text').map(b => b.text).join('') : content

fixes.title: Add handoffCount to session detail response
fixes.description: handoffCount available in list response via DB but missing from detail response
fixes.fix: Include handoffCount from DB session in detail response

fixes.title: Reorder trace read path to canonical ClickHouse first
fixes.description: Currently falls back to lossy platform_events. Should read abl_platform.traces first (canonical)
fixes.fix: When memory store empty: query abl_platform.traces first (gated by OBS_TRACE_CANONICAL_READ), then platform_events fallback
fixes.notes: OBS_TRACE_CANONICAL_READ flag removed entirely. isClickHouseTraceEnabled() used directly.

fixes.title: Add _meta response metadata
fixes.notes: _meta returns source, event_count, is_truncated. query_window_ms deferred (low value).

fixes.title: Add eventType, decisionKind, spanId filter params
fixes.description: Traces endpoint needs filtering for progressive loading and decision filtering
fixes.fix: Parse and apply eventType, decisionKind, spanId as WHERE clauses in ClickHouse query
fixes.notes: sendTracesResponse() at sessions.ts:1602-1627 filters by eventType, decisionKind, spanId query params. Applied post-fetch (not in CH WHERE clause).

fixes.title: Add include=metrics for span-level aggregation
fixes.description: When include=metrics, return per-span aggregated metrics alongside events
fixes.fix: Run secondary ClickHouse query: GROUP BY span_id, parent_span_id with sum(tokensIn), sum(cost), count()
fixes.notes: sendTracesResponse() at sessions.ts:1653 calls computeSpanMetrics() when include=metrics. Aggregation done in-memory from fetched traces.

fixes.title: Add DB fallback for historical sessions
fixes.description: Returns 404 for historical sessions not in RuntimeExecutor
fixes.fix: Look up agent by name from session.currentAgent in DB when RuntimeExecutor session not found

fixes.title: Add ClickHouse fallback for export
fixes.description: Only reads from in-memory TraceStore, so historical sessions can't be exported
fixes.fix: Add same ClickHouse fallback chain as /traces endpoint
fixes.notes: Export endpoint now resolves runtimeSessionId from DB and falls back to queryClickHouseCanonicalTraces when in-memory is empty.

fixes.title: Add ClickHouse fallback for generations
fixes.fix: Query ClickHouse: SELECT * FROM abl_platform.traces WHERE event_type = 'llm_call' AND tenant_id = ? ORDER BY timestamp DESC

fixes.title: Add model name normalization
fixes.description: Raw model string from provider, not normalized
fixes.fix: Normalize model IDs using getModelCapabilities lookup

fixes.title: Remove separate 'decisions' WebSocket message type
fixes.description: Decision events should arrive as regular trace_event messages, not separate 'decisions' type
fixes.fix: Delete decision-log.ts, remove decisions message type from WS handler. Decisions flow through emitDecision() as trace events
fixes.notes: No 'decisions' WS message type exists. Decision events flow as type: 'trace_event' with decisionKind in data payload.

newApiRequirements.purpose: Progressive loading - events within a specific span
newApiRequirements.description: Dedicated endpoint for lazy-loading span children. Currently partially implemented as spanId query param on /traces

implementation.query: SELECT * FROM abl_platform.traces WHERE session_id = ? AND tenant_id = ? AND parent_span_id = ? ORDER BY timestamp ASC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

newApiRequirements.purpose: Server-side aggregated session metrics (cost, tokens, duration, error count)
newApiRequirements.description: Dedicated metrics endpoint that queries ClickHouse for aggregated counts without transferring full event payloads. Eliminates client-side metric computation

implementation.query: SELECT count() as trace_count, sum(tokensIn) as total_tokens_in, sum(tokensOut) as total_tokens_out, sum(cost) as total_cost, min(timestamp) as first_event, max(timestamp) as last_event, countIf(has_error = 1) as error_count, countIf(event_type = 'llm_call') as llm_call_count, countIf(event_type = 'tool_call') as tool_call_count FROM abl_platform.traces WHERE session_id = ? AND tenant_id = ?

newApiRequirements.notes: Returns totalLLMCalls, totalToolCalls, totalTokensIn, totalTokensOut, totalCost, totalDurationMs, errorCount. Falls back to ClickHouse.

newApiRequirements.purpose: Full trace with span tree structure + per-span metrics
newApiRequirements.description: Returns a complete span tree for a trace, including per-span metrics (cost, tokens, duration). Used by Traces Explorer detail view

newApiRequirements.purpose: Cross-session trace search with advanced filters, time range, sparse field selection
newApiRequirements.description: Enhanced trace search endpoint for Traces Explorer. Supports time range, eventType/decisionKind filters, full-text search, column selection

newApiRequirements.purpose: CSV export with streaming response for trace data
newApiRequirements.description: Streaming CSV export of trace events. Separate from /sessions/export which is session-scoped. Requires traces:export permission

newApiRequirements.purpose: Paginated message retrieval independent of full session detail
newApiRequirements.description: For sessions with hundreds of messages, paginate independently. DB already supports findMessagesForSessionCursor()

newApiRequirements.purpose: Bulk trace query across multiple sessions for correlation
newApiRequirements.description: Returns merged, chronologically sorted traces from multiple sessions. For debugging handoff chains across sessions

runtimeFixes.title: Remove per-event flush in ClickHouseTraceStore
runtimeFixes.description: appendEvent() calls await flush() after every insert, defeating BufferedWriter 10K/5s batch policy
runtimeFixes.fix: Remove await this.writer.flush() after insert() in appendEvent(), createTrace(), endTrace(). Keep in close()/shutdown
runtimeFixes.notes: Fire-and-forget via BufferedWriter. No per-event flush.

runtimeFixes.title: Add traceparent/tracestate to workflow-engine proxy
runtimeFixes.description: Cross-service traces break at runtime→workflow-engine boundary
runtimeFixes.fix: Add traceparent and tracestate headers to fetch call alongside existing x-request-id

runtimeFixes.title: Add trace context to Kafka message headers
runtimeFixes.description: Kafka events carry no trace context for correlation
runtimeFixes.fix: Add traceparent, tracestate, session-id to Kafka headers. Gate with OBS_EVENTBUS_TRACE_HEADERS flag

runtimeFixes.title: Replace session.id in voice metrics labels
runtimeFixes.description: 6 voice metric instruments use session.id as label, creating unbounded cardinality
runtimeFixes.fix: Replace session.id with bounded labels: channel, voice.provider, agent_name

runtimeFixes.title: Add Mongo to runtime /health/ready
runtimeFixes.description: Runtime readiness only checks heap + Redis. Mongo outage doesn't fail readiness
runtimeFixes.fix: Add mongoose.connection.readyState === 1 check behind OBS_STRICT_READINESS_GATES flag

runtimeFixes.title: Gate OTEL SDK on config flags
runtimeFixes.description: OTEL_ENABLED and METRICS_ENABLED defined in config but never consumed
runtimeFixes.fix: Check OTEL_ENABLED !== 'false' before sdk.start(). No-op metrics when METRICS_ENABLED === 'false'

runtimeFixes.title: Kill decision-log.ts and merge into trace events
runtimeFixes.description: Two parallel trace systems that don't talk to each other. Decision log requires verbose verbosity but most sessions run standard
runtimeFixes.fix: Add emitDecision() to TraceEmitter with per-kind verbosity gating. Migrate all appendDecision calls. Delete decision-log.ts and decisionLog from session state
runtimeFixes.notes: decision-log.ts fully deleted. emitDecision() in trace-emitter.ts:615 with 11-kind verbosity gating via shouldEmitDecision() in trace-helpers.ts. All call sites migrated.

runtimeFixes.title: Ensure cost field in ClickHouse trace data blob
runtimeFixes.description: Per-span cost lost after memory eviction because not all logLLMCall callers include cost
runtimeFixes.fix: Verify all logLLMCall callers pass cost field. Cost calculation already wired into reasoning-executor, flow-step-executor, llm-field-validator
runtimeFixes.notes: Cost calc wired in previous session. Verify it persists through ClickHouse write path

searchAiFixes.title: Mount metrics router in search-ai-runtime
searchAiFixes.fix: Import metricsRouter and add app.use('/metrics', metricsRouter)

studioFixes.title: Fix replay synthetic spanId to use real values
studioFixes.fix: Prefer event.spanId ?? eventData.spanId ?? ('span-' + event.id) and event.parentSpanId ?? eventData.parentSpanId
studioFixes.notes: Already implemented: replay-trace-events.ts:145 uses `eventData.spanId || 'span-' + event.id` and line 146 extracts parentSpanId. DebugTabs.tsx:356-368 shows contextual message when spans empty but metrics exist.

studioFixes.title: Fix ContentBlock[] handling in conversation tree
studioFixes.fix: Extract text from ContentBlock[]: Array.isArray(content) ? content.filter(b => b.type === 'text').map(b => b.text).join('') : content

newUiRequirements.title: Replace Decisions tab with Traces tab in DebugTabs
newUiRequirements.description: Real-time waterfall via WebSocket using observatory-store. Decision events render inline within parent span

newUiRequirements.title: WaterfallPanel shared component
newUiRequirements.description: Shared wrapper that builds span tree from spanId/parentSpanId and renders SpanTree. Used by debug panel (live), session detail (historical), traces explorer (search)

newUiRequirements.title: NodeDetailPanel right sidebar
newUiRequirements.description: Right sidebar when clicking a span. Summary row (cost, tokens, latency, timestamp). Tabs: Preview (chat bubbles), Request, Response, Metadata, Logs. Decision events show reason/candidates/selected

newUiRequirements.title: TimeRangeSelector component
newUiRequirements.description: Preset buttons (1h, 24h, 7d, 30d, 90d) + custom date range picker. UTC normalization

newUiRequirements.title: AdvancedFilterPanel component
newUiRequirements.description: Right-side slideout (720px). Add/remove filter rows. Typed operators (string: =, !=, contains; number: =, >, >=, <, <=; datetime: >=, <=, =; multi-select: any of, none of). AND logic. Filter tags above table

newUiRequirements.title: ColumnCustomizer component
newUiRequirements.description: Toggle columns on/off, drag to reorder, pinned columns, localStorage persistence

newUiRequirements.title: CsvExport component
newUiRequirements.description: Export button for all visible + hidden columns. Filename with timestamp. Disabled when no data

newUiRequirements.title: Session list filters (time range, status, channel, search)
newUiRequirements.description: Add TimeRangeSelector, status dropdown, channel dropdown, session ID search, environment filter, CsvExport. API already supports status and channel filters

newUiRequirements.title: Traces Explorer with real span tree
newUiRequirements.description: Replace synthesized TraceSpanTree that fakes hierarchy with shared WaterfallPanel using real spanId/parentSpanId. Two sub-tabs: Traces and Generations. All shared components (TimeRangeSelector, AdvancedFilterPanel, ColumnCustomizer, CsvExport)

newUiRequirements.title: Analysis tab or panel in session detail
newUiRequirements.description: Wire GET /sessions/:id/analysis to UI. Show automated diagnostics: issues, suggestions, flow path analysis

newUiRequirements.title: Cost breakdown visualization in Performance tab
newUiRequirements.description: Cost waterfall or bar chart showing per-LLM-call cost, aggregated from trace events

newUiRequirements.title: Performance tab with ClickHouse fallback
newUiRequirements.description: Wire useSessionTraces with types=llm_call to fetch from traces endpoint. Currently only shows in-memory data

newUiRequirements.title: SpanTree enhancements (cost, decisions, status icons)
newUiRequirements.description: Enhance existing SpanTree: decision event rendering (icon + kind badge + reason text), cost column with color coding, token breakdown tooltip, status indicators, copy span ID

platformRequirements.title: Graduate OBS_TRACE_CANONICAL_READ to default-on
platformRequirements.description: ClickHouse canonical traces are opt-in. Most deployments use lossy platform_events fallback. After verifying write reliability, make canonical reads the default
platformRequirements.notes: OBS_TRACE_CANONICAL_READ removed. ClickHouse canonical reads are default.

platformRequirements.title: Add request_id to PlatformEvent envelope
platformRequirements.description: Populate request_id from AsyncLocalStorage during event creation. Persists into custom_dimensions Map column (no ClickHouse ALTER needed)

platformRequirements.title: Archive retrieval APIs (RFC-015)
platformRequirements.description: 6 archive routes defined in RFC-015: /api/archives, /api/archives/:id, /api/archives/:id/download, /api/archives/audit-export, /api/archives/sessions, /api/archives/traces. Not covered in observatory spec

platformRequirements.title: Alert rule evaluation APIs (RFC-016)
platformRequirements.description: Alert config CRUD (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /alerts) and alerting scheduler from RFC-016. Not covered in observatory spec. Separate system from session/trace observability

platformRequirements.title: Coroot infrastructure monitoring deployment
platformRequirements.description: eBPF-based infrastructure monitoring (K8s, MongoDB, Redis, ClickHouse, inter-service). SLO-based alerting with AI root cause analysis. ~70 lines of code changes + Helm chart

platformRequirements.title: Workspace concept within organizations
platformRequirements.description: Target hierarchy: Account -> Workspace -> Project. Workspace provides team-level collaboration and scoping. Currently flat org -> project

implementationOrder.phase: Phase 0: Data Foundation (must-fix before anything else)
implementationOrder.rationale: ClickHouse writes correct span_id/parent_span_id/agent_name. Replay uses real values. Without these, all historical session views are broken
Kill decision-log.ts, merge into traces. Enable canonical ClickHouse reads. Ensure cost persists
Add filtering, metrics, progressive loading, ClickHouse fallbacks to existing endpoints
Build shared WaterfallPanel + NodeDetailPanel, enhance SpanTree, fix content rendering, replace Decisions tab
TimeRangeSelector, AdvancedFilterPanel, ColumnCustomizer, CsvExport, session list filters, Traces Explorer
Cross-service trace propagation, metrics cardinality, readiness, config flags
Trace detail, cross-session queries, analysis tab, cost breakdown, archives, alerts, Coroot, workspaces
